MultiLineIfElse:BambooServiceImpl.kt$BambooServiceImpl$"Cannot trigger build for $chainKey: a build is already running or queued, and this plan allows only one concurrent build."
MultiLineIfElse:BuildDashboardActionGate.kt$BuildDashboardActionGate$"Disabled: local branch doesn't match the focused PR ($focusBranch)"
MultiLineIfElse:BuildDashboardPanel.kt$BuildDashboardPanel.<no name provided>$"Force poll build status now"
MultiLineIfElse:BuildDashboardPanel.kt$BuildDashboardPanel.<no name provided>$"Trigger a new build with custom variables"

MultiLineIfElse:ManualStageDialog.kt$ManualStageDialog$StagesData( stageNames = null, errorMessage = "No stage information available for plan $planKey. " + "Trigger a full build first so Bamboo records the stage list." )
ParameterListWrapping:ManualStageDialog.kt$ManualStageDialog.WrappingMonospaceCellRenderer$( table: JTable, value: Any?, isSelected: Boolean, hasFocus: Boolean, row: Int, column: Int )
SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithAnnotations:BambooApiClientLatestResultTest.kt$BambooApiClientLatestResultTest$@Test fun `master key ending in digit PROJ-BUILD2 uses direct latest`()
SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithAnnotations:BambooApiClientLatestResultTest.kt$BambooApiClientLatestResultTest$@Test fun `plain master key PROJ-PLAN uses direct latest`()

SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithAnnotations:BuildDashboardPanel.kt$BuildDashboardPanel$// Auto-detected plan key (not saved to settings â€” it's branch-specific) @Volatile private var activePlanKey: String = ""

SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithComments:BambooBuildRunConfiguration.kt$BambooBuildSettingsEditor$/** * Comma-separated stage names to run, or blank to run all stages. * Example: `"Build,Unit Tests"` runs only those two stages. */
SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithComments:BambooBuildRunState.kt$BambooBuildProcessHandler.Companion$/** Floor for the configured poll interval â€” prevents accidental sub-10s polling. */

SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithComments:BuildDashboardPanel.kt$BuildDashboardPanel$/** * Single field scope for all fire-and-forget launches in this panel â€” follows the * non-`@Service` convention in `core/CLAUDE.md` "Service & threading conventions" * (canonical example: `AgentController.controllerScope`). Cancelled in [dispose], * which the tool-window `Content` lifecycle guarantees via the * `WorkflowToolWindowFactory` dispose cascade. `Dispatchers.IO` (not `.Default`) * because every launch here is I/O â€” Bamboo HTTP, log fetch, monitor polling. */
SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithComments:BuildDashboardPanel.kt$BuildDashboardPanel$// Auto-detected plan key (not saved to settings â€” it's branch-specific)
SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithComments:BuildDashboardPanel.kt$BuildDashboardPanel$// Phase 5 T15: amber banner shown when interactionMode == ReadOnly. Wires
SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithComments:ManualStageDialog.kt$ManualStageDialog$// CUSTOM_STAGES: "Save as default for this suite" checkbox.
SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithComments:ManualStageDialog.kt$ManualStageDialog$// CUSTOM_STAGES: error message to show when stage load fails.
SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithComments:ManualStageDialog.kt$ManualStageDialog$// Whether stage loading is in progress (CUSTOM_STAGES only).

UnusedPrivateProperty:BambooServiceImplTestResultsTest.kt$BambooServiceImplTestResultsTest$// Service where testClientOverride is null AND bambooUrl is blank â†’ client property returns null. private val unconfiguredService = BambooServiceImpl(mockProject)
Wrapping:BambooApiClient.kt$BambooApiClient${ log.warn("[Bamboo:API] Authentication failed (401)"); ApiResult.Error(ErrorType.AUTH_FAILED, "Invalid Bamboo token") }
Wrapping:BambooApiClient.kt$BambooApiClient${ log.warn("[Bamboo:API] Not found (404)"); ApiResult.Error(ErrorType.NOT_FOUND, "Bamboo resource not found") }
Wrapping:BambooApiClient.kt$BambooApiClient${ log.warn("[Bamboo:API] Rate limited (429)"); ApiResult.Error(ErrorType.RATE_LIMITED, "Bamboo rate limit exceeded") }

Wrapping:BuildDashboardPanel.kt$BuildDashboardPanel.BuildHistoryCellRenderer$(" ${value.buildRelativeTime}", SimpleTextAttributes( SimpleTextAttributes.STYLE_ITALIC, if (!selected) StatusColors.SECONDARY_TEXT else null ))

Wrapping:BuildDashboardPanel.kt$BuildDashboardPanel.BuildHistoryCellRenderer$("#${value.buildNumber}", SimpleTextAttributes( SimpleTextAttributes.STYLE_BOLD, if (!selected) StatusColors.LINK else null ))
Wrapping:BuildDashboardPanel.kt$BuildDashboardPanel.BuildHistoryCellRenderer$("Failed", SimpleTextAttributes( SimpleTextAttributes.STYLE_PLAIN, if (!selected) StatusColors.ERROR else null ))
Wrapping:BuildDashboardPanel.kt$BuildDashboardPanel.BuildHistoryCellRenderer$("Running", SimpleTextAttributes( SimpleTextAttributes.STYLE_PLAIN, if (!selected) StatusColors.WARNING else null ))
Wrapping:BuildDashboardPanel.kt$BuildDashboardPanel.BuildHistoryCellRenderer$("Success", SimpleTextAttributes( SimpleTextAttributes.STYLE_PLAIN, if (!selected) StatusColors.SUCCESS else null ))

Wrapping:ManualStageDialog.kt$ManualStageDialog$(JBLabel("STAGES TO RUN").apply { font = font.deriveFont(java.awt.Font.BOLD, JBUI.scale(10).toFloat()) foreground = com.workflow.orchestrator.core.ui.StatusColors.SECONDARY_TEXT }, gbc)
Wrapping:StageDetailPanel.kt$StageDetailPanel$(JBLabel("No test results available.").apply { horizontalAlignment = SwingConstants.CENTER }, BorderLayout.CENTER)
